recommendations.title: Lost and Delirious
recommendations.overview: After starting at an upmarket boarding school, a teenage girl forms close friendships with her two older roommates. However, when she discovers that her new friends are lovers she finds herself caught in a complicated situation.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Mind
recommendations.overview: From the heights of notoriety to the depths of depravity, John Forbes Nash Jr. experiences it all. As a brilliant but socially awkward mathematician, he made a groundbreaking discovery early in his career and stands on the brink of international accl

recommendations.title: Punch-Drunk Love
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward and volatile small business owner meets the love of his life after being threatened by a gang of scammers.

recommendations.title: The Toll
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward driver and a weary passenger try to make it to their destination while being haunted by a supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.

recommendations.title: Confessions of an Invisible Girl
recommendations.overview: When the clever but socially-awkward Tetê joins a new school, she'll do anything to fit in. But the queen bee among her classmates has other ideas.

recommendations.title: Horse Girl
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward woman with a fondness for arts and crafts, horses, and supernatural crime shows finds her increasingly lucid dreams trickling into her waking life.

recommendations.title: Black as Night

recommendations.title: Muriel's Wedding
